metadata.title:
A WOMAN FOR WHOM ALL THE WORLD


AFFORDS EMPLOYMENT OF THE MIND
Woman and EXPERT Fnner All This

A Member of Spokane Chamber of Commerce

pages.raw_text:
It is really remarkable in these
days to find a woman who figures
highly in the business world and
holds social and political positions
that would command credit for one
who devotes their entire time and
energy to the one particular voca-
ton


Recent instances pertaining to
public affairs have brought Mrs.
Phoebe Cox into the limelight
which made her known to the bust
ness world as a financier of no lit
tie ability. And the chief recogni-
ton was the urgent solicitation and
acceptance of her as member of
the Spokane Chamber of Commerce.


Mrs. Cox is one of only three
Spokane women who have attained
this high business standing. Aside
from this, she figures on the bust
ness committees of the Spokane
Woman's Club and the Spokane
Political Equality League.


In her personal business career
Mrs. Cox has acquired variety of
commercial assets and proven her
self shreWd Investor aud a COM
~petent conductor in each capacity.
Independence mining claims No.
! and 2, located in the Elk City min.
ing district, are now the property
of Mrs. Cox. These claims were
on the market at ordinary figures
when she employed experts to in
vestigate their value, and after the
purchase more thorough investi-
cation was made and the ore
proved to be from a productive gold
vein. The independence mines are
now being operated under Mrs.
Cox's personal supervision.


The ST. George apartment house
at Lincoln street and Third avenue,
is among Mrs. Cox's city property
holdings, while an orchard in Vera
